page_content: HLTH709 Public Health Research Journal Club (1 Credit) Discussion of recent research literature from top peer-reviewed journals focusing on cutting edge research issues related to public health. Examines public health research issues and their relationship to the conduct and application of public health practice. Restriction: Must be in Ph.D.: Public and Community Health (Doctoral) program; or must be an advanced MPH Behavioral and Community Health student; or permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 4 credits.
